name: Rathopper
tips: Leap lets Rathopper jump over one enemy minion when moving forward. Use this to bypass a tanky blocker and threaten sacrifice on the back row.
If every tile ahead of Rathopper is occupied by enemies, Leap becomes a sacrifice — Rathopper hops over all of them and scores. This is a surprise win condition.
Rathopper cannot leap over friendly minions. Clear your own lane before trying to leap — otherwise it moves normally.
At 19/13, Rathopper hits hard but dies easily. Treat it as a glass cannon or sacrifice threat, not a sustained fighter.
Rathopper's leap sacrifice won't trigger the opponent's Sparkfed Surgebot react — Surgebot requires no allies on board, and the opponent would need their own board empty, not yours.
